steps.title: Translate each animal's land use
steps.content: Each horse requires $3$ acres, so $h$ horses require $3h$ acres. Each goat requires $1$ acre, so $g$ goats require $g$ acres.

steps.title: Write the total
steps.content: The total land required is $27$ acres, so $$3h+g=27.$$ This is equivalent to $$g+3h=27.$$
